name: consumer_finance_near_miss_event_southport_car_fair
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Consumer Finance, the situation tagged internally around consumer finance near miss event southport car fair has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ansel Patel
agents.identity: I am Ansel Patel, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Consumer Finance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Rahman
agents.identity: I am Leila Rahman, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Consumer Finance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ansel Patel must choose under care versus fairness. What does Ansel Patel do?
